summary: Verified the Jeff-corpus storage projection parent after four-lens rework. The shipped projection now reports the corpus is fully indexed, preserves the original 92-repo scenario projection, and feeds the daily-report surface so storage risk is visible before future ingestion work resumes.

acceptance_gates.evidence: tests/jeff-corpus-storage-projection.sh pass 13/0; live projection reports average_total_qdrant_mb_per_verified_repo via .flywheel/scripts/jeff-corpus-storage-projection.sh --json
Live projection preserves scenario_remaining_count=92 and projected_scenario_remaining_gb=3.07 while current remaining_actual_count=0.
Live projection reports disk_free_gb=134.4, disk_free_pct=14.51, headroom_above_reserve_gb=41.76.
tests/daily-report.sh reached and passed normal_day_jeff_projection_section and normal_day_projection_json before an unrelated flywheel-loop doctor tail hung in canonical-sync substrate work.

validation.result: rc=0; verified_indexed_count=177; index_target=177; remaining_actual_count=0; scenario_remaining_count=92; projected_scenario_remaining_gb=3.07; recommendation=full_already_indexed_monitor
Projection-related assertions passed; the later flywheel-loop doctor check hung in canonical-sync substrate work and was stopped. This is not used as full-test pass evidence.

open_risks: Daily-report full test still has a substrate-coupled doctor tail that can hang behind canonical-sync/fleet propagator work; this closeout does not claim that unrelated full test is clean.
operator_value: Turns Jeff-corpus storage growth from a surprise disk-pressure failure into a daily visible capacity decision with a concrete recommendation.
